name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Card Holder. Like the various shades of taupe, Gucci's enduring designs introduce new models every season. In the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, taupe adds a fresh, enduring vibrancy to the new leather goods collection. This classic GG Marmont Card Holder is presented with a vibrant touch. Taupe quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, twelve card slots and three bill slots, zip coin pocket
name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Card Holder. Like the various shades of taupe, Gucci's enduring designs introduce new models every season. Taupe quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, twelve card slots and three bill slots, zip coin pocket
Model: 443123.
Size: 10.5x(L) x 19(W) x 2cm(D)
Color: Taupe/Original leather.
Italian creation
